top_signals.title: Gold Jumps After Soft US Job Numbers Ease Fed Rate Hike Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold spiked after weak US job numbers eased fears that the Federal Reserve may raise interest rates this year to tackle inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Chinese energy group’s shares triple in Asia’s biggest IPO this year
top_signals.summary: China Resources New Energy raises $3.6bn amid heavy demand from retail investors
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US unemployment ticks down in June, supporting hawkish Fed pivot
top_signals.summary: While job growth figures underwhelmed, the overall picture of the US labour market remains robust
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Kyrgyzstan Scrambles for Backup Fuel Supplies as Russian Shortage Bites
top_signals.summary: Kyrgyzstan, which imports more than 90% of its gasoline supply from Russia, is concerned that the Russian fuel crisis could cripple supply to the Central Asian nation. Thus, the Energy Ministry of Kyrgyzstan has asked its neighbors, as well as Russia, to help with its fuel supplies. Currently, fuel stocks in Kyrgyzstan remain sufficient, Kyrgyzstan’s authorities have assured the public, but the crisis in Russia could soon begin to be felt in the central Asian nation. “To ensure sustainable fuel supplies, official requests have been…
